data.body:
[operator-attested] LIVE CALIBRATION of project.portability (indigoid-unmystic-serpent) — PASS on the first complete run, meeting every release threshold.

Command: .venv/bin/rebar criteria eval project.portability --runs 3 --output json
Model: anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-6 (pinned in .rebar/evals/plan-review-project-portability.eval.yaml)
Runs (epochs): 3 over all 8 dataset cases (PORT-F1..F4 must-fire + PORT-N1..N4 must-not-fire) = 24 model calls, all succeeded (no timeout/API error/partial).
UTC: started 2026-07-17T03:19:50Z, completed 2026-07-17T03:24:23Z.
Worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-jira-reb-1003; base origin/main cb0f8ec3b (includes the landed eval-resolution fix, bug 2340, Gerrit change 751 MERGED) + stack head a02752c03.

Aggregate metrics: n_fire=4, n_nofire=4, recall=1.0, false_accept=0.0, agreement=1.0, Cohen kappa=1.0, per-case stability min=1.0 mean=1.0.
Required thresholds: recall 1.0 (MET), false_accept 0.0 (MET), agreement 1.0 (MET), per-case stability >= 2/3 (MET, 1.0), kappa >= 0.70 (MET, 1.0).

Per-case (expected_fire / observed_fire / stability): PORT-F1 fire/fire/1.0; PORT-F2 fire/fire/1.0; PORT-F3 fire/fire/1.0; PORT-F4 fire/fire/1.0; PORT-N1 no-fire/no-fire/1.0; PORT-N2 no-fire/no-fire/1.0; PORT-N3 no-fire/no-fire/1.0; PORT-N4 no-fire/no-fire/1.0.

This same attestation is recorded on child ticket 21dd-8681-4447-4bc0 (indigoid-unmystic-serpent). The live-eval command was previously blocked by bug 2340 (namespaced project criteria failed to resolve in the eval path); that fix landed on main independently (change 751) and this stack was rebased onto it, unblocking the run.
